titleStmt.title: SII 41.9: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 9. (A.R. No. 9 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This inscription begins with the praśasti commencing with ‘Tirumagaḷpōla’ etc. It records the gift of 96 sheep, by a Kāḷi-Mataṅgan, brother of Kāḷi-Āchchan of Uḍuppur, in Vēsālippāḍi, for burning a perpetual lamp during the Tiruppaḷḷikkaṭṭil and ardhayāma services in the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiyār at Tirukkōvalūr in Kuṟukkai-kuṟṟam, in Jananātha-valanāḍu alias Milāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaic celviyun=taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai
maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nu
ḷampapāṭiyun=taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaiñāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇ
ṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi
ttaṇṭāṟkoṇṭu taṉneḻilvaḷaruḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭuntoḻutakaivi
ḷaṅkumyāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakecari vanmarāṉa
śrīrājarāja(rāja) tevaṟki yāṇṭu 27 Āvatu milāṭāṉa caṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭu kuṟukkaik kūṟṟat
tu tirukkovalūrt tiruviraṭṭāna muṭaiyār tirupaḷḷikkaṭṭil tiruvattacāma ttukku vecālippāṭi
Uṭuppūruṭaiya kāḷiyāc cantaṉ tamaiyaṉ kāḷimataṅkan Eriya vaitta ṉuntā viḷakkoṉṟi nu
kku Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu cāvāmuvāp perāṭu can=tirātittavarai Itu panmāheśvara Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
